$comment: Generated by Phase 2 (TODO-03) Joint Blueprint Validation. BINARY consensus gate over the mutual consistency of PRD.md v2.0, hld.md (APPROVED), and the Phase 1.5 API contract (openapi.yaml + fr_api_traceability.json + error_catalog.json).
hld_status: hld.md stands unchanged; no architectural fix required in-session

roles.business_analyst_agent: PASS - all 29 FRs covered by HLD and API; 6 non-API FRs legitimate; DPDP erasure/access/no-retention/residency/x-pii all present; BDD acceptance criteria implementable.
roles.product_manager_agent: PASS - WSJF/MVP sequencing consistent; x-pii and x-audit-log present where required; GTM tiers reflected in x-rate-limit; one partial-coverage note (ADV-003).
roles.solution_architect: PASS - every API schema entity exists in HLD data model; section_id universal key intact; error codes map to HLD fault-tolerance (fallback branch, IDOR guard, outbox erasure); /v1/route routing-only and /v1/answer SSE invariants honored. No CRITICAL gap to fix.
roles.consensus_agent: JOINT APPROVED - zero CRITICAL open items after round 1.

review_notes: No CRITICAL items were found, so none required in-session fix; all surfaced items are MEDIUM/LOW advisories for Phase B.

The most material finding (ADV-001, fr_api_traceability.json header scalar miscount: declared 19/10 vs actual 23/6) is a documentation-accuracy defect in an upstream APPROVED artifact, not an architectural or FR-coverage gap. Left untouched per the do-not-modify scope; recorded as a MEDIUM advisory with a precise one-line correction for the Phase 1.5/Phase B owner.

Confirmed legitimate (no gap): FR-027 no_retention is correctly absent from RouteRequest because /v1/route reads existing TOC and stores no new artifacts; multi-document is routing-only for MVP per OAQ-4.
